what_is_operating_system.question: What is the main purpose of an Operating System?
options: To provide a database for user files
To manage computer hardware and software resources
To allow the user to write high-level code
To design the physical circuits of the CPU

what_is_operating_system.question: Which component of the OS is considered the core and remains in memory at all times?
What is a 'System Call' in an Operating System?
options: The programmatic way in which a computer program requests a service from the kernel
A call made by the hardware to the user
A way to reboot the operating system
An error message displayed on the screen

what_is_operating_system.question: Which type of OS is designed to respond to events within a very strict and specific time constraint?
In an OS, what is the role of the 'Shell'?
options: It acts as an interface between the user and the kernel
It is the physical casing of the computer
It is a type of permanent storage

what_is_operating_system.question: Which of the following is NOT a primary function of an Operating System?
Which OS architecture allows multiple users to share the same computer resources simultaneously by switching between them rapidly?
